name: k8s-workload-full
description: A plain Kubernetes workload diff (Deployment + Service + ConfigMap) activates the k8s profile with always-load checklists plus reliability-checklist.
prompt: I've staged the following changes. Run `/kk:review-code` against them.
trap: Model skips the `k8s` profile and applies only generic SOLID/security/quality checks, or spuriously loads `helm-checklist.md` / `kustomize-checklist.md` despite their triggers not firing, or forgets to load `reliability-checklist.md` even though `kind: Deployment` is in the diff.

assertions.text: Identifies `k8s` as the active profile via content signals (`apiVersion:` + `kind:` at zero indent in each YAML document block).
Loads the four always-load checklists from `profiles/k8s/review-code/`: `security-checklist.md`, `architecture-checklist.md`, `quality-checklist.md`, `removal-plan.md`.
Loads `reliability-checklist.md` because the diff contains a top-level YAML document with `kind: Deployment`.
Does NOT load `helm-checklist.md` — no `Chart.yaml` is present, no file under a `templates/` directory with a `Chart.yaml` ancestor.
Does NOT load `kustomize-checklist.md` — no `kustomization.yaml`/`kustomization.yml`/`Kustomization`, no `bases/` or `overlays/` path in the diff.
Does not activate a programming-language profile (no `.go`/`.py`/`.java`/`.js`/`.ts`/`.kt` files in the diff).
Emits findings grouped by `(k8s, <checklist>)` — each finding cites which checklist produced it.

Emits at least one content-level finding from the fixture — candidates include the mutable `:latest` image tag (`deployment.yaml`), missing `resources` requests/limits, missing dedicated `serviceAccountName`, missing `securityContext.runAsNonRoot` / `readOnlyRootFilesystem`, or the absence of a `PodDisruptionBudget` for the Deployment. A model that routes the profile correctly but emits zero findings against a fixture that intentionally contains violations does NOT satisfy this eval.
